features.featureTitle: Create a full-screen welcome landing page as the very first screen users see when visiting the site. It must prominently display 'Welcome to NIRGRANTHA' as the hero heading, include the company name 'NIRGRANTHA' styled as the brand, and provide a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Get Started' or 'Enter Portal') that navigates the user to the role selection / login page. This page should appear before any login or role selection UI.

Update the app navigation flow in App.tsx to introduce a new 'welcome' view state as the initial state (replacing 'landing' as the first shown view). The sequence must be: welcome page → role selection/login page → role-specific dashboard. Ensure the existing role-based login and dashboard logic is preserved unchanged.

Apply a visually rich, cohesive design theme to the welcome landing page that reflects NIRGRANTHA's identity as an AI-powered EdTech platform for Indian engineering colleges. Use a bold, modern color palette with deep gradients, elegant typography for the brand name, subtle animated or decorative background elements, and a professional yet energetic visual style. Ensure the theme is consistent with the existing portal design tokens defined in the project.
